Family trip

Sicily Tour 2026 🏝️

July 2026

StayB&B in Mongerbino 🏡

Bagheria (PA)

01Walking distance from the B&B

  • 🌊 Beach: Lido del Carabiniere, Le Tre Piscine
  • 🏛️ To visit: Il Faro di Capo Zafferano, Area archeologica di Solunto
  • 🐬 Small villages: Sant'Elia bay, Santa Nicolocchia bay
  • ⛰️ Hike: Parco di Monte Catalfano — stay on the signed path, risk of snakes
Groceries
  • Small supermarket (walking distance): Sisa Di Santa Flavia Sant'Elia
  • Big supermarket (by car): U Centesimu
  • Fresh fish: Prontomar Porticello

02🗺️ Afternoon activities nearby

  • 2 afternoons visit & dinner in Palermo (after 5PM, very hot earlier) — full guide in the Palermo tab, Giulia will be your guide 😍
  • Afternoon visit to Bagheria's historical villa: Villa Palagonia
  • Wine tasting 🍷 Cantine Duca di Salaparuta To book — Giulia
  • Padel court in Bagheria (R2 Sport Club) or Tennis in Casteldaccia 🎾 To book — Giulia
  • Small boat tour around the area 🛶 To book — Giulia

03Day trip

  • Visit Cefalù, dinner at our favourite fish restaurant "Lo Scoglio Ubriaco" 🌊🌟🦐 — avoid weekends, too crowded
  • Daily entrance at the resort with swimming pool To book — Giulia
    • 35€ pp + eat at the pool bar, or 80€ pp incl. lunch at the restaurant
    • Padel: 25€ in the morning + 4€ equipment

04🍽️🍷 Restaurants & drinks

Dinner around the B&B
  • Pizza: Antica Pizzeria La Punta
  • Fish: Ristorante Al Faro Verde (pricy but fresh fish)
  • Beers, sandwich & aperitivo: Baia Santa Nicolicchia, Kalos Santa Flavia
Elsewhere in the area (by car)
  • Canopia
  • Ai Limoni Altavilla
  • Osteria del Mare del Maccarrone — raw food cooked by a fisherman, street stand
  • U'Rajs Trabia
  • La Rotonda Casteldaccia (great for ice cream)
Drinks in Palermo
  • Botanico
  • Botteghe Colletti
Live music
  • Blanco Sporting Club: 21 / 25 / 26 July
  • Sunday 26/07: La Terrazza Sunset Club
Apéritif + dance
  • Villa Giulia
  • Seäson Sferracavallo (needs booking, Friday or Saturday)

Palermo 🏛️

Giulia's own walking tour of the city — starred stops ⭐️ are the must-sees.

City tour

  • Walk from the Politeama area, stop at "I Cuochini" for Sicilian street food, then a guided tour of the Teatro Massimo ⭐️
  • Explore historic Palermo along Via Maqueda, stop at "Ke Palle" for arancine and granita with brioche
  • Visit the Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio (Martorana Church) and try the best cannolo at "I Segreti del Chiostro", inside the cloister of Santa Caterina ⭐️
  • Continue to Piazza Pretoria (Piazza della Vergogna), admire the Quattro Canti, then Palermo Cathedral ⭐️
  • Visit the Palatine Chapel ⭐️ and the Palace of the Normans
  • Walk La Cala waterfront and the new trapezoidal pier, stop for pane e panelle or pani câ meusa at "Porta Carbone alla Cala" ⭐️
  • Visit the Monreale Cathedral ⭐️
  • Trip to Mondello

Food

  • Sicilian restaurant: Locale (my favourite)
  • Market: Il Capo
  • Sicilian street food: I Cuochini
  • Pane e panelle / pani câ meusa: Porta Carbone alla Cala
  • Seafood (recommended by friends): Ristorantino Leone
  • Pizza: Funnaco, Apud Jatum

Favignana 🐠💙

What to do

  • Go around by e-bikes and visit the island bays 🚲🌊
    • Most famous: Cala Azzurra, Bue Marino, Cala Rossa (then visit Giardino dell'Impossibile for the tuff quarries), Spiaggia di Marasolo, Cala Grande
    • Beach with bar: Calamoni, Lido Burrone
  • Aperitivo at sunset at "Cibo, Chiacchere e Vino" 🍷 after 7PM, sunset around 20:30 Book a table 1–2 weeks in advance
  • Boat tour around the island 🚤
  • Dinner in Favignana city 🍽️

Restaurants

Lunch
  • U Coppu — typical Sicilian small fried fish
  • Cala Cala Sicilia — poke
Aperitivo
  • By the beach: Pura Vida, A Leva
  • City center, in the old Florio tonnara: Camparia
Dinner Book a table
  • Osteria Sotto Sale
  • Formica
  • Trattoria La Pinnata
  • Quello Che C'è C'è

Marsala 🌅🏖️

  • Best sunset and aperitivo at Mamma Caura, between the salt pans Book a table
  • Beach: Spiaggia di San Teodoro
  • 🍷 Wine tasting at the famous Cantine Florio
Sicily · 20–27 July 2026 · made with 🍋 for the trip
